name: coasty
description: Full computer use for Claude — desktop, browser, terminal, files, schedules. Sandbox VMs free, AWS/Azure infra for production.
long_description:
Coasty is the only MCP server that gives Claude full computer access — desktop applications, browser automation, terminal execution, file operations, and scheduled jobs (cron + webhooks + email) — running on either a cloud VM (AWS EC2 ARM64 / Azure ACI) or your own machine via the Coasty Electron app. 26 tools (incl. one-shot get_capabilities + get_pricing for agent onboarding), 2 prompts, 4-mode approval system, HMAC-signed webhooks, Idempotency-Key support, and free sandbox keys for instant development.

Competitors like Browserbase ship browser-only; E2B ships sandbox-only; Anthropic's built-in Computer Use ships cloud-only with no scheduling. Coasty covers all of those surfaces in one package, with a local-execution path so your data never has to leave your machine.

Sandbox keys (sk-coasty-test-*) return mock VMs in under 50 ms with zero billing — write your agent against the real wire format, then swap in a live key (sk-coasty-live-*) to ship.

api_key.title: Coasty API key
api_key.description: Get a free sandbox key (sk-coasty-test-*) at https://coasty.ai/developers — it returns mock VMs with zero billing, perfect for development. Use a live key (sk-coasty-live-*) for real AWS/Azure provisioning.

base_url.title: API base URL (advanced)
base_url.description: Only change this if you're running self-hosted Coasty.

tools.name: coasty_predict
tools.description: Run a Coasty CUA prediction: given a screenshot and a goal, return a list of actions (click/type/scroll/etc.) with exact coordinates.

tools.name: coasty_ground
tools.description: Find the (x,y) coordinates of an element described in plain language.

tools.name: coasty_ocr
tools.description: Extract text from a screenshot with bounding boxes.

tools.name: coasty_parse
tools.description: Parse pyautogui code into structured Coasty action records (no LLM call).

tools.name: coasty_list_machines
tools.description: List the user's Coasty VMs.

tools.name: coasty_get_machine
tools.description: Fetch one VM by id.

tools.name: coasty_take_machine_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of a running VM's desktop.

tools.name: coasty_provision_machine
tools.description: Provision a fresh VM (Linux or Windows; cloud or sandbox).

tools.name: coasty_terminate_machine
tools.description: Terminate a VM (irreversible — uncommitted state is lost).

tools.name: coasty_start_machine
tools.description: Resume a stopped VM.

tools.name: coasty_stop_machine
tools.description: Stop a running VM (preserves state, cheaper idle billing).

tools.name: coasty_execute_machine_action
tools.description: Dispatch any of 40+ allowlisted actions: click, type, scroll, key combos, browser navigate/click/type, file read/write, terminal exec, etc.

tools.name: coasty_run_terminal_command
tools.description: Execute a shell command on a VM (PowerShell on Windows, bash on Linux).

tools.name: coasty_list_schedules
tools.description: List your Coasty schedules.

tools.name: coasty_get_schedule
tools.description: Fetch one schedule by id.

tools.name: coasty_list_schedule_runs
tools.description: Cursor-paginated execution history for a schedule.

tools.name: coasty_create_schedule
tools.description: Create a cron / one-shot schedule. Appears in the user's /schedules dashboard automatically.

tools.name: coasty_update_schedule
tools.description: Update a schedule (PATCH any field).

tools.name: coasty_delete_schedule
tools.description: Soft-delete a schedule.

tools.name: coasty_run_schedule_now
tools.description: Manually fire a schedule (idempotent with key).

tools.name: coasty_pause_schedule
tools.description: Disable future fires.

tools.name: coasty_resume_schedule
tools.description: Re-enable future fires.

tools.name: coasty_add_trigger
tools.description: Attach a webhook / email / chain trigger. Webhook secrets returned ONCE.

tools.name: coasty_remove_trigger
tools.description: Remove a trigger.

tools.name: coasty_get_credits
tools.description: Read current credit balance, tier, and period usage.

tools.name: coasty_get_pricing
tools.description: Public pricing snapshot — subscription tiers, boost packages, per-call rates. Zero credits, no auth.

tools.name: coasty_get_capabilities
tools.description: One-shot service description: tools, scopes, limits, discovery links. Zero credits, fully local.
